ideation: This animation sequence depicts a woman lifting weights, focusing on the arm movements involved in a bicep curl.  The sequence will emphasize the exertion and controlled movement of the arms. The right arm will be the primary focus, mimicking the lifting motion, while the left arm will provide a counterbalance and visual interest.  I will use the two-joint arm model to simulate a bicep curl, and I will pay close attention to the transitions between frames to ensure a fluid and expressive animation. I will keep the overall pose dynamic and energetic.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely, ready to lift
the right arm curls the weight up with effort
the right arm lowers the weight with control
the right arm lifts again, a steady repetition
